name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Western Union is a global money transfer service enabling customers to send and receive funds internationally and domestically with competitive exchange rates and low fees.
description_long:
Western Union is an established global financial services company that specializes in money transfer and payment solutions. The company has built its reputation over decades as a trusted provider for moving money across borders and between individuals worldwide. Their platform serves millions of customers annually who need to send funds to family, friends, or business contacts in different countries.

Western Union's core offerings include online money transfer services with competitive pricing. They advertise exchange rates ranging from 16.9723 to 17.6573 MXN per USD (as shown on their website), with transfer fees ranging from $1.99 to $0.00 USD depending on the transfer type and promotion. The company provides registration incentives including zero-fee first-time international online transfers and better exchange rates for registered users. Their platform supports transfers to over 200 countries and territories with multiple currency options.

What distinguishes Western Union is their extensive global reach and multiple currency support shown on their website, covering major destinations including Mexico, Guatemala, Philippines, India, Colombia, Jamaica, and nearly every country worldwide. Their fee structure is transparent and competitive, with promotional offers for new users. The company provides both online and potentially in-person transfer options (though only online is detailed in provided content).

However, customers should understand that Western Union's fees, while competitive, still represent a cost compared to traditional banking transfers. Exchange rates shown reflect their margin on currency conversion. The service is most valuable for international transfers where traditional banking alternatives may be unavailable, slower, or more expensive. For domestic USD-to-USD transfers within the United States, this service may not offer significant advantages over standard bank transfers.
address: 298 N Capitol Ave, San Jose, CA 95127

company_info.headquarters: 298 N Capitol Ave, San Jose, CA 95127

pros: Zero-fee promotion on first international online transfer for new registered users
Supports transfers to 200+ countries and territories with diverse currency options
Transparent fee structure displayed upfront ($1.99-$0.00 USD range shown)
Competitive exchange rates with better rates offered to registered users
Real-time receiver calculation showing exact amount recipient will receive (MXN example shown)
Online registration available for faster service and improved rates
Multiple major currency pairs supported including USD, MXN, GTQ, PHP, INR, and others
cons: International transfers incur fees and exchange rate margins despite promotional offers
Service temporarily unavailable for some payment methods (Orange wallet mentioned as unavailable)
Exchange rates vary significantly based on destination and amount, requiring manual rate checking
No information provided about customer service accessibility, dispute resolution, or delivery timeframes
Domestic USD transfers offer limited value proposition compared to traditional banking alternatives
best_for: Individuals sending money internationally to family or friends in 200+ countries
Customers seeking competitive exchange rates on foreign currency transfers
New users wanting to avoid transfer fees on their first international transaction
People needing transparent, upfront pricing on money transfer services
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers sending money internationally who need competitive exchange rates, transparent pricing, and access to 200+ countries. The main caveat is that while promotional zero-fee transfers are available for new users, ongoing transfers will incur fees and exchange margins, making this service most cost-effective for international rather than domestic transfers.
services: USD to foreign currency conversion (16+ currencies displayed)
Money transfer to Mexico, Guatemala, Philippines, India, Colombia, and 200+ countries
Registered user accounts with improved exchange rates
First-time transfer fee waiver promotion ($0.00 fee)
Multiple currency pair support including MXN, GTQ, PHP, INR, COP, JMD, AFN, EUR, ALL, AOA
Domestic USD transfers within United States
International transfer fee structure ($1.99 to $0.00 USD range)
